CP00-529 — the RP17 AI Governance P04 workflow permission slice (40 units, RP17.P04.M03.S19–RP17.P04.M05.S14, risk B) — passes independent read-only review:

- **Distributions reconcile** — pack binding, requirements, contract projection, and a hand-recount of the 40 units all agree on {claude_review:4, implementation:11, ui:18, security_audit:4, fixture:1, test:1, hermes_evidence:1} and micro-titles {4,22,14}.
- **Implementation is sound** — all 7 required exports exist, every descriptor row is `descriptor_only`/`runtime_execution:false`, and the package source is pure (no fs/fetch/child_process/DB/network).
- **Gates pass locally** — contract deepEqual validator, 3 CP529 tests, and the full validation command set (npm test, validate, all rpNN, plan/weighted/spec/fullplan/goal/control-plane, git diff --check) recorded at exit 0.
- **Boundaries hold** — Claude is read-only and explicitly not final approver; enterprise trust not claimed from local validation; Hermes used only as a deterministic evidence packet; `production_ready:false` correctly pending human closeout.
